overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city bar during a heavy rainstorm at night. The player moves from a covered outdoor patio into a neon-lit interior space with digital signage, then exits back onto the rainy street with glowing advertisements and wet pavement reflections. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

approaching the glass entrance doors to the interior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a covered outdoor patio during a heavy downpour at night. The camera moves forward past concrete seating benches where patrons sit sheltered from the rain. Through glass walls on the right, neon signs glow through the downpour as the camera approaches the entrance to the interior bar space.

events.description: entering the interior bar space from the covered patio, leaving the rain behind

polished dark stone flooring reflecting interior lights
recessed warm lighting fixtures in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the warmly lit interior of the bar, leaving the rain behind. A bartender works behind the polished counter while digital menu screens glow on the walls. The space features dark marble floors and recessed ceiling lighting as the camera moves deeper into the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar lounge area with seating booths and large advertisements

navigating around lounge seating booths while moving forward

red and black hanging flags suspended from the ceiling
television displays showing various content on the walls

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the bar, the camera passes a prominent illuminated advertisement poster on the left wall. The space opens into a lounge area with padded booth seating where several patrons relax. Red and black banners hang from the ceiling as the camera navigates between tables toward the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area near exit with view of rainy neon street

events.description: approaching the glass exit doors with view of the rainy street outside
neon light from the exterior street becoming more prominent through the glass

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit while observing the rainy street and neon signs outside

decorative trees in planters near the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the exit of the bar, where large glass doors reveal the rainy street outside. Neon signs glow through the downpour, casting colored reflections on the wet pavement. Potted plants line the exit area as the camera moves toward the threshold between the warm interior and the stormy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with neon signage and wet pavement

events.description: exiting the building onto the sidewalk into the heavy rain
cars driving past on the wet street with headlights reflecting on pavement

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto the city sidewalk into the heavy rain and neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet street with headlights illuminating the rain

tropical palm trees lining the street
metal bollards separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits onto the sidewalk into the heavy downpour, immediately exposed to the rain. The street stretches ahead with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon signs from surrounding buildings. Palm trees line the walkway as cars drive past on the road, their headlights cutting through the rain. The scene is dominated by the glow of cyberpunk advertisements and the shimmer of water on every surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy outdoor patio into a neon-lit cyberpunk bar before returning to the stormy city streets. It begins by gliding past concrete benches under a heavy downpour, moving toward the entrance as neon signs glow through glass walls. As the camera crosses the threshold, the rain vanishes and the environment shifts to a warmly lit interior featuring polished counters, digital menus, and dark marble floors. The scene then expands through a lounge area with padded booths and hanging red banners before turning toward the exit, where large glass doors reveal the shimmering, wet pavement outside. Finally, the camera steps back into the heavy rain, moving onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees where vibrant advertisements and car headlights reflect off the saturated asphalt.
